VibesServicesContact

Start a conversation

Tell us what you're building.

No sales funnel, no auto-responder pretending to be a person. This actually goes to a human who'll read it and write back. The two questions below aren't required -- but they're the fastest way to skip the small talk.

❯ Inline validationEssential

A form that tells you what's wrong as you go -- not after you've hit submit and lost your place -- is honestly the single kindest thing you can do for the person filling it in. Genuinely essential, and cheap to get right too.

How it's done

Native HTML validation types (email, required) plus a small script that surfaces errors on blur and on submit, with aria-invalid and linked error text for screen readers.

❯ Form vs. a plain email linkSituational

A form's worth it when the structure actually helps -- the vibe and involvement pickers below genuinely speed things up. When it doesn't though, a mailto link is more honest than a form pretending to be a CRM. This one's upfront about being mailto-powered until a backend actually earns its place.

How it's done

On submit it composes a prefilled email to us and opens your mail client. No database, no third-party tracker, no cost we'd pass to a client for a contact page. When volume justifies a backend, this swaps to a serverless action without changing the UI.

Opens your email client with everything filled in -- you send the final word. Prefer to skip the form?Email us directly.

✓ Off it goes

Check your email client.

We've composed the message and handed it off to your mail app -- give it a read and hit send. If nothing opened, just write tojohnathanmoore9066@gmail.comand we'll pick it up there.

[ARTIFICE UI]

Websites with a voice, not a template.

The vibesServicesContact

Artifice -- clever, cunning trickery. We took the name so we'd be the one to point it out first.
